Video.summary: A Miami couple's future is at stake as differing dreams and financial conflicts test their six-year relationship.
Video.title: Benatar vs. Porciello

Video.summary: Ricky sues his ex-girlfriend, Jada, saying she stole $800 of his child support money to buy tickets to a Beyoncé concert.
Video.title: Colbert vs. Adams

Video.summary: Tyrone claims his ex wife Tania got him falsely arrested 3 times so he's here to sue her for $3,000.
Video.title: Reformed Pimp Sues His Madam

Video.summary: Terry is suing his ex-wife because he lent her money for their daughter (18) to have surgery on her jaw.
Video.title: A Host of Issues

Video.summary: Kentra wants a paternity test after the man who signed her birth certificate has been in and out of her life.
Video.title: Believing the Birth Certificate

Video.summary: A man says he dated the defendant for 20 years, and they have a child together, but now that he's married, the defendant has become extremely jealous of his new relationship; he sues for breach of contract, an electric bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Love, Lies, and Legal Ties

Video.summary: Terrell sues girlfriend Kristy for damages because he suspects she is using him for money.
Video.title: Marrow vs. Coleman

Video.summary: Newlyweds Eric and Sarah seek the judges' help navigating kids, careers and compatibility.
Video.title: Orive vs. Stark

Video.summary: Former roommates and ex-lovers, Shelby and Natalie, settle a dispute over unpaid rent money.
Video.title: Hannan vs. Davila

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: Kenneth sues his wife, Monika, for $1,000 in property damage because she burned his clothes after he refused to clean up after himself.
Video.title: Burke vs. Burke

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: Robert sues property manager Jorge for $10,000, claiming harassment, unlawful entry, and invasion of privacy. Jorge denies the accusations, says he's just doing his job, and countersues for $10,000, alleging he's the one being harassed.
Video.title: Nosey Landlord

Video.summary: Elizabeth sues Alexis for $2,162, saying Alexis rented her house for a graduation party and caused major damages, including a broken door. Alexis denies the claims, insists she cleaned up, and accuses Elizabeth of overreacting for money
Video.title: Your Teenagers Trashed My House

Video.summary: Theresa and Paul Cacciato are suing their former tenant, Theresa Kordulak, for $2,160, accusing her of damaging their furnace after leaving her pet grooming business. Kordulak denies the claim, stating the furnace never worked and countersues
Video.title: Fireworks Over a Furnace

Video.summary: Quadaisa Nelson sues Marlow White for $1,167.87, claiming he stole the iPhone and laptop he gifted her after an argument. Marlow, who raised her since she was four, says he reclaimed the gifts due to disrespect.
Video.title: A Family Fall Out

Video.summary: Florence sues Lora, claiming the puppy she bought from her shop, Harley, was sick and cost $1,600 in vet bills. Lora insists the puppy was healthy at sale and denies responsibility for its condition after four months.
Video.title: You Sold Me a Sick Dog!

Image.alt: You Sold Me a Sick Dog!
You Sold Me a Sick Dog!
You Sold Me a Sick Dog!

Video.summary: The plaintiff, who took guardianship of the defendant's baby because she was born with meth in her system, sues the birth mother for breach of contract; the defendant counter-sues for unreturned property and says the plaintiff is vindictive.
Video.title: Guardianship Grudges

Video.summary: A man and his wife petition the court for a paternity test because they believe the defendant may be the man's daughter.
Video.title: Long Lost Daughter?

Video.summary: Alisha is being sued by her step father, but says she owes him nothing after he put her in foster care.
Video.title: Coping with Family Chaos

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after she found a provocative message from another woman in her live-in boyfriend's phone, he became violent, and she was forced to hide in a closet; she sues him for repayment of loans; he says she was the aggressor.
Video.title: Live-In Liar

Video.summary: Shaneequa loved her precious pooch but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could.
Video.title: Screwing the Pooch

Video.summary: Comedian Allan Cunningham is suing his former fan for the money she owes him for a private party.
Video.title: Heckling the Plaintiff

Video.summary: Johnny is suing his former friend for costs stemming from a botched dog-sitting deal.
Video.title: Sin and Tonic

Video.summary: Daryl is suing his ex-friend for missing belongings that he believes were sold to fuel a gambling addiction.
Video.title: Gambling the Friendship

Video.summary: Deputy Adams eradicates an indoor and outdoor marijuana grow.
Video.title: But I have a Prescription!

Video.summary: The SED act on a felony warrant. Deputy Miller breaks up an underage party in the woods.
Video.title: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Image.alt: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Video.summary: Deputies respond to an ongoing fight between drug users in Pollock Pines. A business owner claims she is being harassed and victimized.
Video.title: Meth Freaks Abound

Video.summary: Deputy Campora arrests two men in possession of drugs and with felony warrants. Deputies Brady and Ford enforce a restraining order.
Video.title: What Bump in My Pants?

Video.summary: Deputy Miller gets physical with an aggressive transient. Deputy Turnbull demonstrates an exercise in mental gymnastics.
Video.title: Hostile & Homeless

Video.summary: A troubled 15-year-old boy goes through the booking process.
Video.title: Scared Straight? We Hope So!

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt evacuates homeowners during the Sand Fire.
Video.title: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Image.alt: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Video.summary: Denise sues her ex, Darryl, claiming he tricked her into paying their son’s $200 DUI bail entirely, instead of splitting it. Darryl counters, saying she wired the money voluntarily and owes him $21,000 in back child support.
Video.title: You Are a Deadbeat Mom!

Video.summary: A shocking witness and the results of a DNA test determine the future of Mafi and Athena's tumultuous relationship.
Video.title: Knighton vs. Carrillo

Video.summary: Wendy Cooper sues her neighbor Melanie Carducci for $4,975, claiming harassment and psychological harm. Wendy says Melanie harassed her and her dog, while Melanie counters that Wendy caused constant conflict, even filming through her windows.
Video.title: Neighbor Nightmare

Video.summary: Deborah sues Charles for $800 after he left her tree-removal job unfinished, leaving her yard in chaos. Charles claims he started the work on a massive tree but needed more time, only for Deborah to hire someone else. Now, she wants her money back.
Video.title: Tree Cutter Tantrum

Video.summary: Sherman is suing is ex-wife because he claims during their marriage she cheated on him with his best friend.
Video.title: Threatening an Ex

Video.summary: Did their office friendship go too far? Are her misconduct claims a cover for the money she owes?
Video.title: Gross Misconduct

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: Jasmine and Drayson are suing each other over a security deposit due a flea infestation.
Video.title: Welcome to the Flea Circus

Video.summary: Dolly Parton impersonator Charlene is suing her cousin over a loan. Tiffany says she never wanted repayment.
Video.title: Hello Dolly

Video.summary: A car sale between coworkers started off sour turned bitter and ended with a sweet old lady.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Delvon's suing for wifi costs and alienation of affection. Tedmenia says she's just chatting online!
Video.title: Anti-Social Network
